RULING: NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER.THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING- GRANT- NO OPPOSITION FILED.Prevailing party to prepare order. (302/PHA)ROBERT BALIAN # 5220

Off Calendar Feb-26-2002 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2002 Sent To Arbitration
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Court ordered defendants TED DONALSON, C & C ENTERPRISES, BING CHIN, HAROLD CAULFIELD, AND E.J. MCCARTHY dismissed, The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Case is ordered to Arbitration effective 2/25/2002, pursuant to CCP section 1141.11 (a). Proceedings reported by: Mary J. Hinds. (212)
